examples: The EDIFIER - On-line magazine promoting the edification of the body of Christ.
Edifier is distributed in over 60 countries, with sales in excess of 8 million audio units last year.
Boasting an iconic sail inspired design and crystal clear sound reproduction, Edifier's Spinnaker evokes a sensory experience unlike any other.
Edifier is a leading designer and manufacturer of internationally award-winning audio speaker products featuring contemporary design and superior sound quality.
